flags: strong cell deviating 116° to the left of mean flow — SUSPECTED supercell; needs Doppler velocity to confirm rotation
cells repeatedly crossing a similar axis — training / back-building; flash-flood risk for steep coastal catchments
VRADH (Doppler, 0.5°, Nyquist ±6 m/s) at the strongest cell: max gate-to-gate shear 3 m/s, but mesocyclone-scale rotation folds at this Nyquist — INCONCLUSIVE without dealiasing
